revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-190

Internal Transmittance (of a homogeneous non-diffusing plate)

The ratio of the luminous flux (F2) reaching the exit surface of the plate to the flux (F1) which leaves the entry surface.

Symbol: Ti

Reference: C.I.E. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
